rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SAN FRANCISCO WAR MEMORIAL TRUST DATED 08/19/1921, AMENDED 06/30/1928
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents Trustees Demurrer To Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument And Instructing The Trustees.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. The Commission lacks standing because it is not a trustee or beneficiary. The petitioner may file an amended petition to substitute a party that has standing within 30 days of the order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 7/1/2015, at 4:00 p.m. The hearing on the demurrer (if the tentative is contested) is continued to July 7, 2015, at 2:30 p.m. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order.
